message: The finest weapons of the Dark Dwarf are forged here.
Our armor protects the warriors of the Dark Dwarf.
Travelers are always welcome among the Dark Dwarf. I also collect many curios and cultural items from our people.
The Kobold grandmaster stole our sacred sigil. Bring it back and you shall earn our favor.
